zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg於1358年11月15日出生在可特格希 貝也纽伦堡時，她的父親Friedrich V von Nuremberg25歲，母親Elisabeth von Sachsen28歲。她於1374年6月27日與Ruprecht III von der Pfalz在德國海因里希_奧斯普斯可萊斯 格爾達普安格結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1411年7月26日在德國巴登-爾特波格海德爾格海德爾格享年52歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格海德爾格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg于1358年11月15日出生在可特格希 貝也纽伦堡时，她的父亲Friedrich V von Nuremberg25岁，母亲Elisabeth von Sachsen28岁。她于1374年6月27日与Ruprecht III von der Pfalz在德国海因里希_奧斯普斯可萊斯 格爾達普安格结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1411年7月26日在德国巴登-爾特波格海德爾格海德爾格享年52岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格海德爾格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg was born on 15 November 1358, in Nuremberg, Bavaria, her father, Friedrich V von Nuremberg, was 25 and her mother, Elisabeth von Sachsen, was 28. She married Ruprecht III von der Pfalz on 27 June 1374, in Amberg, Goldap, East Prussia, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 26 July 1411, in Heidelberg, Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 52, and was buried in Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg est née le 15 novembre 1358, à Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern, son père, Friedrich V von Nuremberg, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Sachsen, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Ruprecht III von der Pfalz le 27 juin 1374, à Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Prusse Orientale, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1411, à Heidelberg, Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg am 15. November 1358 in Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Friedrich V von Nuremberg 25 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth von Sachsen 28. Sie hat am 27. Juni 1374 in Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Deutschland Ruprecht III von der Pfalz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1411 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Heidelberg, Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg è nata il il 15 novembre 1358 nel Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern, sua padre, Friedrich V von Nuremberg, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth von Sachsen, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Ruprecht III von der Pfalz il 27 giugno 1374, nel Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1411, nel Heidelberg, Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnbergが1358年11月15日にクoニグレイチ バイエルンンuルンバーグで生まれた時，父Friedrich V von Nurembergは25歳，母Elisabeth von Sachsenは28歳であった。1374年6月27日にドイツプレウssンオストプレウssンクレイス ゴールダップアンバーグでRuprecht III von der Pfalzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1411年7月26日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグヘイデルバーグヘイデルバーグで52歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグヘイデルバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Bavaria, Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 쿨바치 쿨바치 플래센버그
ko.Jena, Weimar, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germ: 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h 크레이스 위마 제나

ko.Amberg, Goldap, East Prussia, Prussia, G: 독일 플레우ss 오스트플레우ss 크레이스 골다프 아버그
ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg(이)가 1358년 11월 15일 ko니그레이치 베이른 뉘른베르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Friedrich V von Nuremberg(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth von Sachsen(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1374년 6월 27일 독일 플레우ss 오스트플레우ss 크레이스 골다프 아버그에서 Ruprecht III von der Pfalz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1411년 7월 26일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 헤이들버그 헤이들버그에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 헤이들버그에 묻혔다.

pt.15 November 1358–26 July 1411: 15 de novembro de 1358–26 de julho de 1411
pt.Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Bavaria, Germany: Plassenburg, Kulmbach, Landkreis Kulmbach, Bayern, Alemanha

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg nasceu em 15 de novembro de 1358, em Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern, seu pai, Friedrich V von Nuremberg, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth von Sachsen, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Ruprecht III von der Pfalz em 27 de junho de 1374, em Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de julho de 1411, em Heidelberg, Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg родилась 15 ноября 1358 г. в местности Нюрнберг, кoниграич беиирн, её отцу по имени Friedrich V von Nuremberg было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Sachsen, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ruprecht III von der Pfalz 27 июня 1374 г. в местности эмбирг, крис голдап, остпреуssен, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 июля 1411 г. в местности хиделбирг, хиделбирг, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности хиделбирг, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg nació el 15 de noviembre de 1358, en Nürnberg, Königreich Bayern, su papá, Friedrich V von Nuremberg, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elisabeth von Sachsen, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Ruprecht III von der Pfalz el 27 de junio de 1374, en Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1411, en Heidelberg, Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
